# SteveAI – Ultimate AI Assistant
Developed by Saadpie. Multi-Modal AI Orchestrator.

## Core Features
- 100+ Conversational Models (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5, DeepSeek-R1)
- 23+ Image Models (RealVis XL, Juggernaut X)
- 3D Sculptor: Spatial mesh generation via Hunyuan3D-2

## Technical Specs
- Uses specialized model routing for precision.
- Hosted on Netlify.
- Multi-modal orchestration layer.
